title: Fishing Loot
aliases: what can you get from fishing
quickAnswer: Fishing can give fish, junk, or treasure. Treasure loot improves with a proper open-water setup and is more worthwhile with Luck of the Sea and Lure.
keyFacts: Treasure items include enchanted books, bows, saddles, and nautilus shells.
Open-water requirements matter if you want the full treasure pool instead of a weaker setup.
Lure speeds catches, while Luck of the Sea shifts odds away from junk and toward treasure.
commonMistakes: Fishing in a cramped pool and assuming treasure rates are normal.
Expecting fishing to beat targeted farms for bulk food or rare mob-specific drops.
